## Self-Check
<!-- Tick every box before submitting — do not leave any unchecked -->

- [ ] HTML validator passes (zero errors): https://validator.w3.org/
- [ ] CSS validator passes (zero errors): https://jigsaw.w3.org/css-validator/

- [ ] All form inputs have linked `<label>` elements (if I have a form)
- [ ] Page opens correctly in Chrome with no console errors
- [ ] Responsive — tested at 375px width in Chrome DevTools
- [ ] CSS is in an external file (no inline styles, no `<style>` tags)
